nasb.text: When the messengers entered, behold, the household idol was on the bed with the quilt of goats’ hair at its head.

esv.text: And when the messengers came in, behold, the image was in the bed, with the pillow of goats’ hair at its head.

cnv.text: 奉派的人進去，看見床上有一尊家中的神像，頭枕在用山羊毛弄成的枕頭上。

ccb.text: 众人进去发现躺在床上的是一个神像，头枕在山羊毛的枕头上。
